title: Rabba Rabba Meeh Varsa
desc: Amidst a drought, a village prays for rain while one child hopes for dryness. As tensions rise, whose wishes will the heavens grant?

title: Yaar Mera Titliaan Warga
desc: A married couple tries to spice up their marriage by talking to other people. However, as fate would have it, they end up talking to each other through their fake social media accounts.

title: Bajre Da Sitta
desc: Two women who possess a melodious voice are scouted by an agent. But, burdened by the rules and prejudice of society, they are forced to remain untrue to their aspirations.

title: Bina Band Chal England
desc: A man lies to his father-in-law about what he does professionally. However, when the lie gets out of hand, things take a chaotic twist.

title: Hoshiar Singh
desc: Determined to teach despite being labeled 'unfit' for education, Hoshiar Singh surmounts obstacles to pursue teaching, innovating a novel approach to education and existence.

title: Nikka Zaildar
desc: Nikka, a young man studying in a college in Patiala, falls in love with a fellow student and decides to pursue her. However, his journey turns out to be more difficult than expected.

title: Haye Bibiye Kithe Fas Gaye
desc: A Punjabi builder moves to Britain, unknowingly settling in a haunted house. It follows his encounters with the ghostly family residing there.

title: Chor Dil
desc: A man gets a heart transplant from an ex-gangster. Suddenly, he feels pulled towards criminal activities as the man deals with his new, unexpected urges.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Speaker Kharke
desc: A comprehensive compilation presents some of the best and most popular songs from movies in the Punjabi film industry played back to back.

title: Main Te Bapu
desc: Laali's life revolves around his widowed father and girlfriend Mahi. Having to choose between them he hatches the idea of getting his father married and things start to get interesting.

title: Chhalle Mundiyan
desc: A man returns to his village with his friends and encounters the woman he loves. However, they both mistakenly believe they have found an ideal spouse in each other.

title: Sufna
desc: Jeet, a carefree young man, and Teg, a poor labourer working in the fields, fall in love with each other. However, they face several difficulties in maintaining their relationship.

title: Es Jahano Door Kitte Chal Jindiye
desc: Punjabi migrants abroad, once full of dreams, now face waves of change and hurdles in returning home, whether they left legally or illegally.

title: Jodi
desc: In 1980s Punjab, two folk artists fall in love while revolutionising music, becoming a celebrated duo but facing mysterious challenges as their fame grows.

title: Carry On Jatta 3
desc: Jass, a lawyer's son, is in love with Meet, but the proposal is rejected by his father. However, he strives to win his lover's hand and devises a plan.

title: Moosa Jatt
desc: A young Moosa, raised by his uncle, discovers that his parents were killed by a land baron who oppresses farmers. Determined to see justice, he vows to avenge their deaths and protect the farmers.
